Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you have a question about my lecture— Hm? Yes? What are you staring at?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is it my helm...? Could that be it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15208 0 0}Is this really happening? Boy, oh boy. That's one discerning eye you've got there, kid![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Isn't this helm great? It is, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a historic masterpiece Masamune had since he was young...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono keeps going on[n]and on with his story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}*sniffle* So Masamune gave this helm to his vassal before he departed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Such generosity! It's as if he foresaw his fate...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15216 0 0}...And that's why I couldn't possibly part with it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}I could give you something else from my personal collection, though—one with no connections to Masamune.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you still want one... Well, you do, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Come see me again, and I'll let you have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a deeper understanding of history...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I come back to speak with Mr. Ono[n]at the faculty office another day,[n]I might get my very own helm...[n]{f 1 1}
